prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-IKSMMRFLASB-3PC-STD-BL0 Product Type: KARAOKE_MACHINE Brand (from catalog): Kid Fun Existing Title: KidFun Sing Along Music Microphone and Amplifier Childrens Karaoke Machine, Ages 3+ Description: Do you have a budding musical artist under your roof? If so, the KidPlay Superstar MP3 Music Microphone Stand and Microphone Childrens Karaoke Machine for Kids is the perfect gift to help them express their creativity and practice their passion, whether performing solo or putting on concerts for friends and family.

Featuring the ability to connect to an Apple iPhone, Samsung Android or MP3 device, as well as built-in jack and speaker—connect to your devices through an AUX cable—kids can sing and perform their favorite kid pop songs, Disney classics or musical hits by easily connecting to a smartphone or cellphone; and if you don’t have one on hand, not to worry, the Superstar karaoke machine singing machine with microphone comes with nine, built-in demo songs. And, adding to your little ones performance are bright, flashing lights to make them feel like they’re really on stage. Flashing along to the music, vibrant and fun dazzling lights accompany your budding musical artist to give them the confidence they need to sing their heart out and wow the crowd with their latest performance.

Lastly, the kids karaoke machine features an adjustable microphone stand with telescopic height of up to 32.25in, the singing machine can grow with your little ones as they do. The karaoke machine also features an easy to use on/off button and adjustable volume too; lastly, the karaoke machine with just a few components is easy to pack up for playdates, parties, sleepovers or even family trips, as you don’t have to worry about finding a charger or being plugged in (batteries included).

With easy assembly, adjustability and tons of cool features, the KidPlay karaoke machine for kids will have your little pop star in training ready for center stage.

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts)

AGE: 3+ Search Terms: karaoke machine microphone for kids system mic stand recording toy mini cheap handheld small singing microphones sing music digital christmas the sound of my theory gifts mp3 player players speaker superstar a star is born girls toys 2 year old 3 6 Features: - FLASHING LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: When your child takes center stage, they will surly be in the spotlight with the bright, flashing lights to make them feel like they’re really on stage! Flashing along to the music, vibrant and fun dazzling lights accompany your budding musical artist to give them the confidence they need to sing their heart out and wow the crowd with their latest performance - EXPRESS THEIR CREATIVITY: A great introduction to music, music theater, singing and performance, if you have a budding musical artist under your roof, the KidPlay Superstar MP3 Music Microphone Stand and Microphone Karaoke Machine is a great gift! With easy assembly, adjust-ability and tons of cool features - STREAM MUSIC: Featuring the ability to connect to an Apple iPhone, Samsung Android or MP3 device, as well as built-in jack and speaker—connect to your devices through an AUX cable—kids can sing and perform their favorite kid pop songs, Disney classics or musical hits by easily connecting to a cellphone - ADJUSTABLE & TRAVEL FRIENDLY: The kids karaoke machine features an adjustable microphone stand with telescopic height of up to 32.25in, the singing machine can grow with your little ones as they do! The karaoke machine also features an easy to use on/off button and adjustable volume too - SPECIFICATIONS: Microphone Stand Dimensions: Max 32.25 inches; Material: Plastic; Color: Blue or Pink; Batteries: Included with purchase; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
